---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
page-layout: full
body-classes: cv-page
toc: false
---

::: {.cv-toolbar}

[Open CV in a new tab](files/molligo-cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

[Download CV](files/molligo-cv.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary download="Patrick-Molligo-CV.pdf"}

:::

```{=html}
<iframe
  class="cv-frame"
  src="files/molligo-cv.pdf"
  title="Patrick A. Molligo Curriculum Vitae">
</iframe>
